BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"1. I feel sad much of the time.","Q1":"2. I do not expect things to work out for me.","Q2":"2. As I look back, I see a lot of failures.","Q3":"2. I get very little pleasure from the things I used to enjoy.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"3. I feel like I am being punished.","Q6":"3. I dislike myself.","Q7":"3. I blame myself for everything bad that happens.","Q8":"2. I would like to kill myself.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"1. I feel more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"3. It's hard to get interested in anything.","Q12":"2. I have much greater difficulty in making decisions than I used to.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"2. I feel more worthless as compared to other people.","Q15":"2. I don't have enough energy to do very much.","Q16":"3+. I sleep most of the day.","Q17":"1. I am more irritable than usual.","Q18":"0. I have not experienced any change in my appetite.","Q19":"3. I find I can't concentrate on anything.","Q20":"1. I get more tired or fatigued more easily than usual.","Q21":"1. I am less interested in sex than I used to be."}
